---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new module, data source, or capability
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful for threat intelligence or security research? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Design

If you have a specific approach in mind, describe it here. Code sketches are welcome.

## Data Sources

If this involves a new data source:
- Is it passive? (public, no authentication required)
- Is it legal to query without authorization?
- Link to the source's terms of service or API documentation.

## MITRE ATT&CK Alignment

Which techniques does this address? (e.g. T1590.001, T1596.003)

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.
